name: TitleBucks Title Loans
description_short: TitleBucks offers vehicle title loans and title pawns using your car as collateral. Cash in 30 minutes, no credit check; APR typically 119%–179%.
description_long:
TitleBucks is a vehicle title loan and title pawn lender operating under TMX Finance LLC, one of the largest title lending companies in the United States. The TitleBucks brand was incorporated in April 2011 and operates approximately 200 stores across multiple states including Georgia, Tennessee, Alabama, Arizona, South Carolina, and Texas. TMX Finance's corporate headquarters is located in Savannah, Georgia, and its broader family of companies — which includes TitleMax, InstaLoan, and EquityAuto Loan — runs more than 1,000 storefronts nationwide. TitleBucks holds no CDFI, HUD, or NFCC certifications and carries an A+ BBB rating across its individual store profiles, though the company is not BBB-accredited.

The core product is a vehicle title-secured loan or title pawn, where customers surrender their vehicle title as collateral in exchange for a lump sum of cash — typically up to $10,000 for standard title pawns, and up to $25,000 for qualifying customers in select markets. State-specific caps apply; Tennessee limits loans to $6,500 and South Carolina sets a minimum of $601. Borrowers retain full use of their vehicle throughout the repayment term. No credit check is required — approval is based entirely on vehicle value and clear title ownership. Transactions can be completed in as little as 30 minutes in-store. Beyond title lending, TitleBucks also offers in-store personal installment loans and online personal loans in Arizona, South Carolina, and Texas. In Texas, the company operates as a licensed Credit Access Business and registered Credit Service Organization, with loans funded through a third-party lender.

TitleBucks was deliberately designed to serve customers whose vehicles don't meet TitleMax's minimum valuation thresholds — making it the TMX Finance entry point for owners of lower-value cars. This niche positioning extends credit access to a borrower segment that may be declined even by sister brands. The 30-minute in-store turnaround and the complete absence of a credit check are the two most operationally meaningful differentiators in a lending category where traditional institutions routinely decline applicants with poor or no credit history.

TitleBucks fills a genuine gap for people who need same-day cash and have exhausted conventional borrowing options. The no-credit-check policy and rapid disbursement are real advantages in a true emergency. The critical caveat is cost: annual percentage rates typically range from 119% to 179%, based on TMX Finance contract data reported by ProPublica — among the highest rates of any legal lending product. Borrowers who cannot repay quickly face sharply accumulating interest charges, and the ultimate consequence of default is vehicle repossession. TitleBucks is best approached as a short-term bridge of absolute last resort, not a routine borrowing tool. Prospective customers should carefully review state-specific contract terms before signing, as rates, fees, and loan structures vary significantly by location.
address: 4312 W Cactus Rd Suite 14, Glendale, AZ 85304

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee offered. Title loan lenders do not typically provide refund guarantees.

pros: Cash disbursed in as little as 30 minutes at in-store locations
No credit check required — approval based on vehicle value and clear title ownership
Borrowers keep driving their vehicle throughout the entire loan term
Specifically designed to serve customers with lower-value vehicles not eligible for TitleMax minimums
Online loan applications available in Arizona, South Carolina, and Texas
Approximately 200 TitleBucks-branded storefronts across multiple states
A+ BBB rating across individual store profiles in GA, TN, AZ, and AL
cons: Annual percentage rates typically range from 119% to 179% — among the most expensive legal loan products available
Risk of vehicle repossession if the loan is not repaid on time, leaving borrowers without transportation
Not BBB-accredited despite individual store A+ ratings
Online personal loans restricted to only three states: Arizona, South Carolina, and Texas
No publicly listed rate sheet — loan terms, amounts, and rates vary by state with limited transparency
best_for: Vehicle owners with a paid-off or nearly paid-off car who need emergency cash the same day
Borrowers with poor or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans or bank financing
Customers with lower-value vehicles who don't meet TitleMax's minimum loan thresholds
Georgia residents specifically seeking a title pawn product
diagnosis: TitleBucks is best suited for vehicle owners facing a genuine short-term cash emergency who own a paid-off car and have no other borrowing options available. The no-credit-check policy and 30-minute in-store turnaround are real advantages — but the 119%–179% APR makes this one of the most expensive loan products on the market, and defaulting puts your vehicle at risk of repossession.
services: Vehicle title loans (car title used as collateral, keep driving)
Online personal loans (Arizona, South Carolina, and Texas only)
Same-day cash disbursement at in-store locations (as fast as 30 minutes)
Vehicle equity assessment for loan qualification
Account management via TitleBucks.com online portal
Loan renewals and extensions (terms vary by state)
Credit Access Business (CAB) loans in Texas funded by third-party lender
Multi-state storefront lending across GA, TN, AL, AZ, SC, and TX
